raw_consumer_statement: Name is XXXX XXXX and I formally requested the XXXX XXXX XXXX membership we currently had with the organization to be canceled immediately and I a requested that our down payment of {$9800.00} be credited back to my credit card account as soon as possible. I received a call from the XXXX  support team to discuss the contract details and it was mentioned that the food and drinks are NOT included in our membership. This is something that was never discussed nor mentioned during the sales process. It was told to me that during the sales process they would include all these Amenities. I canceled within XXXX  month of signing the contract and all I am asking for someone from the accounting team to please review my request and please provide me a full refund of the down payment.
